title: Map a handler boundary without framework leakage
scenario: A handler adapter should translate request DTOs, call the use case, and return response data without pushing HTTP concepts into domain code.
instructions: Implement handle_register_user by converting the request, calling register_user, and mapping outcomes to Response values.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps register-handler-boundary explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
